# RoamPlan
> AI travel planner that builds personalised day-by-day itineraries for any destination in seconds.

## What this site does
RoamPlan uses AI to create a complete, personalised travel itinerary for any destination — including daily schedules, hotel recommendations, restaurant picks, local tips, budget breakdown, and weather forecast. Enter your destination, travel dates, budget, and interests, and the AI builds a trip plan you can follow or customise.

## Who it's for
Solo travellers, couples, families, and groups planning holidays, city breaks, and adventure trips. Works for any destination worldwide and any trip length.

## Key features
- AI-generated day-by-day itinerary for any destination
- Hotel and restaurant recommendations
- Live weather forecast integrated into the plan
- Family and kids mode — child-friendly activities
- Budget breakdown by category (transport, hotels, food, activities)
- PDF export to take your plan offline

## Pricing
Free tier available — plan up to a 3-day trip. Pro plan from $4.99/month for unlimited trip length and destinations.

## Contact
https://roamplan.app
